bird.name: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉
bird.summary: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉（學名：Platycercus venustus，英文：Northern rosella，台湾作北方玫瑰鸚鵡），又稱布朗氏玫瑰鹦鹉、黑草玫瑰鹦鹉，该品种分布于澳大利亚北部，栖息地由东向西从卡奔塔利亚湾到阿纳姆地延伸至金伯利。1820年海因里希·库尔（Heinrich…

locations.name: Heinrich Kuhl
locations.summary: Heinrich Kuhl (17 September 1797 – 14 September 1821) was a German naturalist and zoologist.

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 卡奔塔利亞灣
locations.summary: 卡奔塔利亚湾（Gulf of Carpentaria）是澳大利亚北部的一个长方形浅水海湾，三面环陆，北面是阿拉弗拉海（一个在澳大利亚与新几内亚之间的水体）。面积31万平方千米，东西最大宽度670千米，南北长600千米，最深处为70米。底部…

locations.name: 阿纳姆地
locations.summary: 阿纳姆地（英語：Arnhem Land）是澳大利亚北领地的一个地区。位于澳大利亚北海岸线的中部，东为卡奔塔利亚湾，北部濒临阿拉弗拉海，西部与卡卡杜国家公园接壤。大部分为地高原，平均海拔150米。为澳洲原住民保留地。旅游业兴盛。 参考资料…

locations.name: 金伯利 (西澳)
locations.summary: 金伯利（Kimberley）是澳大利亚西澳大利亚州的九个地区之一，位于西澳州的北部，西临印度洋，北临帝汶海，南为大沙沙漠和塔纳米沙漠，东则与澳大利亚北领地接壤。 该地区以位于南非的金伯利钻石矿区命名，因这两个区域在地形、风景和资源方面均有…

locations.name: Derby, Western Australia
locations.summary: Derby ( DUR-bee) is a town in the Kimberley region of Western Australia.

locations.name: Windjana Gorge National Park

locations.summary: The Wunaamin Miliwundi Ranges (between 1879 and 2020 known as the King Leopold Ranges) are a range of hills in the west…

locations.name: Springvale Station
locations.summary: Springvale or Springvale Station is a pastoral lease that operates as a cattle station in the East Kimberley region of…

locations.name: Warmun Community, Western Australia
locations.summary: Warmun (also known as Turkey Creek or Warmun Community) is a township and locality in the Kimberley region of Western A…

locations.name: Halls Creek, Western Australia
locations.summary: Halls Creek is a town situated in the east Kimberley region of Western Australia.

locations.name: 斐茲洛伊克羅欣
locations.summary: 斐茲洛伊克羅欣（Fitzroy Crossing）為西澳大利亞州金伯利地區的一個小鎮，位於布魯姆以東400公里，距離霍爾斯克里克以西300公里。 距離伯斯州首府約2,524公里，斐茲洛伊河及瑪格麗特河匯流處。

locations.name: 达尔文 (澳大利亚)
locations.summary: 达尔文（英語：Darwin），又譯達爾溫，是位于澳大利亚西北海岸的主要城市，北領地的首府，全國第16大城市，人口約15万人（2016年），属于热带气候，经常受到雷暴和龙卷风的侵袭，最早有记录的熱帶氣旋发生在1867年，1974年12月25…

relations.subject: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉
relations.evidence: The northern rosella (Platycercus venustus), formerly known as Brown's rosella or the smutty rosella, is a species of parrot native to northern Australia, ranging from the Gulf of Carpentaria and Arnhem Land to the Kimberley

relations.subject: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉
relations.evidence: In Western Australia, it is found across the Kimberley south to the 18th parallel, around Derby, Windjana Gorge National Park, the northern Wunaamin Miliwundi Ranges, Springvale Station and Warmun, with vagrants reported at Halls Creek and Fitzroy Crossing

relations.subject: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉
relations.evidence: The northern rosella is occasionally found in mangroves or public green spaces in suburban Darwin

relations.subject: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉
relations.evidence: Found in woodland and open savanna country, the northern rosella is predominantly herbivorous, consuming seeds, particularly of grasses and eucalypts, as well as flowers and berries, but it may also eat insects
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 北澳玫瑰鹦鹉
relations.evidence: It is absent from central Arnhem Land, but is found further east around the western and southern coastline of the Gulf of Carpentaria, south to Borroloola and across the border into western Queensland as far as the Nicholson River. The northern rosella lives in grassy open forests and woodlands, including deciduous eucalypt savanna woodlands
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
